## Description
Brief description of what this PR does (e.g. fix crash, add settings menu).

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## How has this been tested?
- [ ] Ran `npm start` and verified the game runs
- [ ] Tested the specific change (e.g. new button, fixed level load)
- [ ] No new warnings or errors in console

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style of this project (JavaScript, existing patterns)
- [ ] I have run `npm start` and the game works as expected
- [ ] I have updated the README or docs if I changed behavior or setup
- [ ] I have not added unnecessary dependencies (or have justified new ones)

## Related issues
Fixes # (issue number, if applicable)
